classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是三列表格，表头为'引脚号'、'颜色'、'内容'，行内将1至4号引脚分别对应到线色YELLOW/GREEN、YELLOW、RED、BLACK及功能PE、U、V、W，属于动力连接器相线和保护地的针脚接线定义； full marked source 中该表位于Power Connector区域旁，进一步表明其为电源接口引脚表。

title.title_zh: 动力连接器引脚定义表

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框为标注为 'Power Connector' 的圆形连接器针位示意，显示 1 至 7 号孔位及型号 'YL2207ZJ-D'；结合全图相邻表格可见这些针号对应 PE、U、V、W、NC 等动力端子功能，因此最接近动力连接器针脚定义。

text_annotations.correction_note: Pin number label for connector terminal position 1

terminology_notes: Pin numbering follows standard circular connector convention

dimension_records.reason: Clear pin numbering label visible in connector pinout diagram. Corresponds to terminal position 1 in 7-pin power connector configuration.

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: 7-pin circular power connector with pin position 1 clearly marked. Pin layout shows circular arrangement. Full connector model reference YL2207ZJ-D visible in context but outside target region.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Only pin number 1 is visible in target crop. Complete pin numbering (pins 2-7), connector mating dimensions, pin pitch, and contact specifications are not visible in this region. OCR source ocr_002 ('口') appears to be a structural element or bracket misidentified as text and is not a valid engineering annotation.

unresolved_items.reason: Low confidence (0.39), likely misidentified structural element, bracket, or connector outline. Not a valid dimension or label. Excluded from final annotations.
unresolved_items.suggested_action: Discard - OCR noise from geometric shape

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。

仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪框内可见标题文字'Power Connector'，在完整标注图中该标题位于左上动力连接器针位图和引脚颜色功能表旁，用于标识动力接口连接器定义区域，因此最接近动力连接器引脚定义类别。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框为电机技术参数表，包含'Rated Torque'、'Maximum torque'、'Rated Speed nₙ (rpm)'、'Rated Power'等与扭矩、转速和电机性能相关的参数；在给定类别中与性能曲线类的工程含义最接近。

regions.group_name: 电机前端法兰及连接器外形尺寸

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域在完整标注源图中对应电机右侧前视图，显示法兰外形、安装孔、中心圆、连接器外形位置以及尺寸标注'Ø130±0.1'、'4-Ø9'、'd10'、'45°'和连接器型号'YL2207ZJ-D'、'YL2217ZJ'，属于机械结构与安装尺寸信息，不包含针脚功能或接线表。

title.title_en: Motor Front View Mechanical Dimension Drawing

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR detected '∅1' with low confidence and rotated angle. Visual inspection shows this is part of mounting bolt circle dimension 'Ø130±0.1' but OCR failed to capture complete text. Cannot reconstruct without full OCR source_id coverage.
OCR detected '10', context shows this is envelope dimension label 'd10'
OCR detected '45', added degree symbol based on visual context

terminology_notes: Connector model numbers preserved as shown
Diameter symbol '∅' standardized from OCR '09' variants
translation_notes: d10 interpreted as reference dimension label based on context

Connector model designation for right-side connector assembly

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Square flange with 4-Ø9mm mounting holes on Ø130±0.1mm bolt circle. Holes positioned at 45° intervals from centerlines.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Square flange dimension labeled as d10 (value not specified in this region)
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Two connector types: YL2207ZJ-D (left) and YL2217ZJ (right). Connectors mounted on top of motor flange.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: OCR only captured partial text 'Ø1' for bolt circle dimension; full callout 'Ø130±0.1' visible but not completely covered by OCR boxes. Actual numeric value of d10 not specified in this view.

unresolved_items.description: Incomplete OCR coverage for mounting bolt circle dimension
unresolved_items.reason: OCR detected only fragment with low confidence (0.904673) and high rotation angle (145.49°). Full dimension visible in image but no complete source_id available.
unresolved_items.recommendation: Accept partial reconstruction as 'Ø130±0.1' based on visual evidence and engineering context, flagged as medium confidence

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域为电机侧视外形及轴端结构尺寸图，包含外形高度'184 (MAX)'、机身长度'202±1'、轴伸长度'41±1'、轴径'Ø19'及公差、键槽'KEY'和连接器安装外形位置等机械尺寸标注，不包含针脚功能或接线定义。

terminology_notes: Ø symbol corrected from O or 0 in OCR
Tolerance format standardized to engineering notation

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Motor mounting base with dimensions 202±1 mm overall length, 41±1 mm left section, 11 mm height, 3 mm edge
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Shaft with outer diameter Ø95 0/-0.035 mm, bore Ø19 0/-0.013 mm, keyway depth 3 mm, shaft segments: 6-6-32 mm
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Keyway width not specified; shaft segment diameter transitions not dimensioned

unresolved_items.reason: Low confidence OCR with Chinese characters and 'C' - appears to be noise or structural elements misidentified as text
Isolated '9' and '0' fragments near other dimensions - likely OCR artifacts or partial reads of adjacent annotations
unresolved_items.suggestion: Discard - already captured in merged annotations

unresolved_items.reason: Version number V1.2 appears in context but V1.3 is present in target region - suggests document revision history
unresolved_items.suggestion: V1.3 is the active version per T006

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框内是电机扭矩随转速变化的曲线图，纵轴标注'T (N.m)'，横轴标注'n (rpm)'，包含'Intermittent'和'Continous'工作区域以及19.8、6.6、5800等扭矩和转速标注，表示间歇扭矩、连续扭矩与最高转速关系。

text_annotations.correction_note: Label for continuous operation curve (note: original spelling 'Continous' preserved as shown)

terminology_notes: Original spelling 'Continous' preserved as appears on drawing
translation_notes: Graph shows two operating modes: intermittent (higher torque, short duration) and continuous (lower torque, sustained operation)

X-axis label indicating speed in revolutions per minute
Label identifying the intermittent operation performance curve

engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: This is a torque-speed performance curve showing intermittent peak torque of 19.8 N.m and continuous rated torque of 6.6 N.m. Maximum speed is 5800 rpm. The curve shows typical motor characteristics where torque decreases as speed increases. Y-axis scale markers (0, 3, 6, 9, 12, 15, 18, 21) and X-axis scale markers (0, 1000, 2000, 3000, 4000, 5000, 6000) are clearly marked.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内是17针接口表格，列出'PIN'、'FUNCTION'、'COLOR'，包含'DC +5V'、'GND'、'A'、'/A'、'B'、'/B'、'Z'、'/Z'、'U'、'/U'、'V'、'/V'、'W'、'/W'及线色，符合编码器或反馈信号连接器针脚定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内为圆形多芯连接器针位示意，标有1至17等针脚编号及型号'YL2217ZJ'；在完整来源图中该小图紧邻带有PIN、FUNCTION、COLOR列的反馈接口接线表，因此其工程含义是反馈连接器针位定位图。

records.label_text_original: YL2217ZJ connector face with numbered pins
records.translation_en_simple: YL2217ZJ connector face with numbered pins
records.translation_en_full: YL2217ZJ connector face with numbered pins

terminology_notes: YL2217ZJ is the connector model designation
translation_notes: Pin numbering standard for circular connectors

dimension_records.reason: Pin number 1 on YL2217ZJ connector face diagram
Pin number 10 on YL2217ZJ connector face diagram
Pin number 7 on YL2217ZJ connector face diagram

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: YL2217ZJ connector with 17-pin circular layout. Only pins 1, 7, and 10 are clearly readable in OCR. Full pin layout (1-17) visible in image but other pin numbers lack reliable OCR source_ids.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Pins 2-6, 8-9, 11-17 are visually present but do not have corresponding OCR source_ids with sufficient confidence. Connector orientation marker and keying features not dimensioned.

unresolved_items.reason: Low confidence (0.27), appears to be a structural line or connector key feature misidentified as letter I, not a valid pin number or dimension
Low confidence (0.24), located outside main connector diagram, possibly a datum reference or section marker but no clear engineering context in this isolated view
Low confidence (0.49), appears to be a dash or horizontal line element, likely structural graphic rather than dimension text
Very low confidence (0.28), large bbox covering structural elements, likely a false positive from circular connector outline
Visually present in connector diagram but no OCR source_ids available, cannot generate coordinates per constraint rules

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框为机械外形图右下角技术条件表中的环境条件区域，含'Temperature'、'Humidity'、'Environment'、'Installation altitude'等使用条件说明；不包含扭矩转速曲线或连接器针脚定义，在给定类别中最接近机械图纸附属技术信息。
